function.name: scripts_list
function.description: List .ts/.js script files in the Gist (excludes generated entry and rules JSON). Returns filenames and byte lengths.

function.name: scripts_runtime_summary
function.description: Return runtime/preset capability summary, usage boundaries, GM_*/GME_* guidance, constants, and authoring constraints. Call before generating script content.

function.name: scripts_get
function.description: Read one script file by exact Gist filename.

function.name: scripts_search
function.description: Search managed script files in the Gist and return compact line-level matches with bounded context. Prefer this before scripts_get to reduce token usage.

filename.description: Optional exact Gist filename to search within.

function.name: scripts_snippet
function.description: Read a bounded line range from one script file instead of returning the full file.

function.name: scripts_upsert
function.description: Create or replace a script file in the Gist. Before writing userscript content, read existing files for updates, propose and confirm header metadata in most cases, especially activation mode, @match domains/path patterns, and @run-at timing, then validate header sanity and syntax when possible; do not default to broad *://*/* scope unless explicitly requested, and never include API keys in script content.

function.name: scripts_replace
function.description: Replace text in one managed script file server-side. Use expectedCount for safety; avoids full-file get/upsert for small edits.

function.name: scripts_patch
function.description: Apply structured exact-match patch operations to one managed script file server-side. Use for local edits without transferring the whole file.

function.name: scripts_batch_patch
function.description: Apply structured exact-match patch operations across multiple managed script files and write them in one Gist update. Use for related multi-file edits.

atomic.description: Reserved for compatibility; batch writes are prepared before the single Gist update.

function.name: scripts_validate
function.description: Validate one managed script file without returning full content. Checks userscript header sanity.

function.name: scripts_delete
function.description: Delete a script file from the Gist.

function.name: scripts_rename
function.description: Rename a managed script file inside the Gist (read old content -> upsert new filename -> delete old filename).

fromFilename.description: Existing managed script file name in the Gist (e.g. old.ts)

toFilename.description: New managed script file name in the Gist (e.g. hello.ts)
